title: The Income-tax Act, 2025 Is Now in Force: What Changes from 1 April 2026 — and What Doesn't
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: The Income-tax Act, 2025 replaced the 1961 Act on 1 April 2026. It is a re-codification — new section numbers and forms, but the same rates and core scheme — and FY 2025-26 returns still follow the old Act.

title: Goodbye "Previous Year" and "Assessment Year": How the Single Tax Year Works
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: From 1 April 2026 the twin ‘Previous Year’ and ‘Assessment Year’ timelines give way to a single ‘Tax Year.’ Here is what that means in practice — and why no year is skipped in the changeover.

title: 1961 → 2025 Section-Mapping Cheat Sheet
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: A bookmarkable quick-reference mapping the most-used 1961 sections to their Income-tax Act, 2025 numbers — 80C→123, 139→263, 45→67 and more — with a caution to verify every citation.

title: Filing FY 2025-26 (AY 2026-27): The Last Return Under the 1961 Act
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: FY 2025-26 (AY 2026-27) is the last return under the 1961 Act. A practical guide to the new split deadlines, the old-vs-new regime decision, and the documents to keep ready.

title: TDS Under the New Act: Renumbered Sections + the FA 2025 Threshold Hikes Every Deductor Must Apply
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: TDS is changing on two fronts: the FA 2025 threshold hikes that apply now, and the Income-tax Act, 2025 renumbering of every TDS section into 392, 393 and 394 from Tax Year 2026-27.

title: Presumptive Taxation Under the 2025 Act: A Guide for Small Businesses and Professionals in Mysuru
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: Sections 44AD, 44ADA and 44AE fold into a single Section 58 under the 2025 Act. What Mysuru’s small businesses, professionals and transporters need to know about limits, the 5% cash test, and the traps.

title: GST 2.0, One Year On: Living with the Two-Slab Structure — Pricing, ITC and Classification Lessons for MSMEs
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: One year into GST 2.0’s two-slab structure, the operational lessons are clear. Pricing, input-tax-credit discipline and classification — what separates a clean MSME from one still fixing mismatches.

title: GSTAT Is Operational: How GST Appeals Work Now
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: The GST Appellate Tribunal is finally hearing cases. How the appeal chain works now, the 31 July 2026 backlog deadline, the pre-deposit maths, and drafting that survives scrutiny.

title: The 48-Month ITR-U Window: Updated-Return Strategy and the 60/70% Additional-Tax Slabs
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: The updated-return window is now 48 months — but the Finance Act, 2025 added 60% and 70% additional-tax tiers. How ITR-U works, when to use it, and why filing early is always cheaper.

title: Capital Gains on Property After the 2024-25 Overhaul, Restated Under the New Act: 12.5% vs Grandfathered Indexation
author: CA Sagar H R
summary: For property sold on or after 23 July 2024, LTCG is a flat 12.5% without indexation — with a grandfathering option for resident individuals and HUFs. When each route wins, and how it reads under the new Act.
